description: Legal fragment in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100–1138 CE). Separate documents on recto and on verso. The document on recto deals with the sale of a dār in the 'alley of lupine (turmus).' The document on verso involves a woman named [...] b. Ḥananya known as Bint Ibn ʿAṭā'.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
